data.title: Montran appoints Wohoro Ndohho as Executive Director of Montran Africa, focusing on digital expansion in Africa.
data.description: In Nairobi, Kenya on December 5, 2025, Montran, a prominent provider of payment and capital market infrastructure solutions worldwide, has named Wohoro Ndohho as the Regional Executive Director of Montran Africa. This appointment signifies Montran's increased dedication to enhancing digital initiatives in Africa.

data.title: Solana and Coinbase's Base collaborate through Chainlink, allowing crosschain asset transfers between Ethereum layer-2 and Solana.
data.description: A new bridge secured by Chainlink has been introduced by Base, facilitating crosschain asset transfers between the Ethereum layer-2 network and the Solana blockchain. This development is significant as it allows for seamless movement of assets between the two networks. This bridge enhances interoperability in the decentralized ecosystem and provides users with greater flexibility in managing their assets.
Piper Sandler increases Samsara’s price target to $49, up from $48.
Piper Sandler increases Rubrik’s price target to $118, up from $115.
Piper Sandler cuts ServiceTitan’s price target to $140, down from $155.

data.title: Court orders OpenAI to provide 20M ChatGPT logs in copyright case after rejecting bid to limit discovery, citing importance to case.
data.description: A federal judge has denied OpenAI’s request to restrict the discovery process, ordering the company to provide de-identified user logs crucial to the case.

data.title: The Reverie Saigon in Vietnam showcases Italian craftsmanship; 39 stories tall luxury hotel.
data.description: Vietnam's Ho Chi Minh City saw the unveiling of The Reverie Saigon on Dec. 5, 2025. This luxurious 39-story hotel stands out as a symbol of opulence in the midst of the city's vibrant center. Situated between Nguyen Hue Boulevard and Dong Khoi Street, it boasts unparalleled luxury and superior accommodations.

data.title: Small caps close to all-time high, Eli Lilly tests key level, Ulta Beauty leads earnings. Dow Jones futures rise. 5 stocks in buy zones.
data.description: Small cap stocks came close to reaching their highest levels ever as the larger stock indexes halted their momentum. Eli Lilly is currently positioned at a critical point, with Robinhood making significant purchases. Ulta Beauty reported strong earnings results late in the day. Following the surge in small cap stocks, Dow Jones futures are on the rise, with Eli Lilly being closely monitored as it approaches a key level. Additionally, there are five stocks currently in buy zones according to reports.

data.title: SOL expected to hit $155-165 in 2-4 weeks as bullish trend strengthens; 1st resistance at $146.91.
data.description: According to technical analysis, it is predicted that SOL may potentially increase to a range of $155 to $165 within the next 2 to 4 weeks. The initial obstacle is at $146.91, which will serve as a key test to determine if an upward trend will continue.

data.title: ADA price forecast aims for $0.39-$0.65 in the short term, and $1.69 potential recovery in the medium term despite current weakness.
data.description: The forecast for ADA price is showing conflicting signals, with short-term projections ranging between $0.39 to $0.65. However, the medium-term outlook for Cardano suggests a possible recovery to $1.69.

data.title: XRP price expected to reach $2.35-$2.70 in 30 days despite current consolidation and 4.35% drop to $2.10.
data.description: Predictions for XRP indicate a potential rebound to a range between $2.35 and $2.70 in the next 30 days, fueled by bullish MACD signals. Despite a recent 4.35% drop, the price has found support at $2.10. This suggests a positive outlook for XRP in the near future.

data.title: TELUS prices US$1.5 billion junior subordinated notes offering, base shelf accessible, CAD$ supplement in 2 days.
data.description: TELUS has made their base shelf prospectus available for public access, and the prospectus supplement for a CAD$ offering will be available within two business days through SEDAR. Vancouver, BC - On Dec. 4, 2025, TELUS revealed the pricing of a US$1.5 billion aggregate principal amount offering.
